title: Stuff n' Such
description: A Mod featuring an array of items. Taken from different games, ideas, and heads
body:
# About
Stuff n' Such is a Mod encasing a ton of ideas. With Features from many games, such as Terraria and Halo. One second you could be fighting a wretched beast, the next, you get blown up via a Pipe-Bomb. Magic, Technology, Science, Weapons, All in one mod

# Features:
Not All of them, theres too many to list. This is just a select few.
## Someone Say Armor?
![New Armor Sets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1479706352661ab47f44e016e2ae0c3e07e893e.png)
This Mod Adds an Array of New Armor Sets. 

### Energy Infused Armor
A Basic Upgrade to Netherite housing no other special uses.

### Plasma Reinforced
Now The Fun Starts - Plasma Reinforced Armor Has the Ability to charge the Armor via the Use of "Plasmatic Gel". Charging the full Armor set gives some general potion upgrades.

### Defence Powered Armor
Powered via "Energy Cells" This Armor set offers more of a defence focus when the whole suit of power.

### Movement Powered Armor
Sporting a New Red Look, This armor set gets its power from the "Golden Plate of Cookies" item. Granting the player new moves like a dash, and a few extra jumps.

## Wands? Were a Staff Family
![WAND!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b25eb797f509db292da106e98254738715200f3d.png)
You thought is was only armor? Nope! Staffs are a item that let you cast spells. You craft them from combining elements in the "Staff Creation Table". They feed on xp however, so you might want to get xp, and fast!

Why not use the;
### XP Staff
The XP Staff is an item costing no XP to use. It Fires a Spray of 4 Bottles o' Enchanting, per right click. Players can use the item agian, after a cooldown.

### Ice Staff
The Ice Staff is a Item that Shoots a Freezing Snowball that, when in contact of an entity freezes them in place, slowly ticking their health away for a couple of seconds. An XP Level of 4 is needed to use cast the spell.

### Fire Staff
The Fire Staff is an Item that, when right clicked, summons a fireball in the casters looking direction.. Look, they cant all be winners. An XP Level of 4 is needed to cast the spell.

### Wind Staff
The Wind Staff is an Item that, when right clicked shoots the player up into the air, giving slow falling for the decent. An XP Cost of 20 is Needed to Cast the Spell.

### Lighting Staff
The Lighting Staff is a Powerful item. When right clicked, it summons lighting to every entity that isnt the player within a 20 block radius. An XP Cost of 30 is needed to cast the spell, however, it only takes 1 when used.

### Group Healing Staff
Akin to the Lighting Staff, the Healing Staff Gives Regeneration to Any Entity within a 15 Block radius of the player, when right clicked. An XP Cost of 15 is Needed to cast the spell, However only 1 is used when casted.

## Is that a reference to Something?
![Pew Pewrs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb2a2461985225babc2b71d69999c72b119197ba.png)
This Mod has a heap of guns, and other spiked items waiting to be triggered.

### Plasma Rifle
The Plasma Rifle is an Item that shoots "Plasma". It Does 3 Hearts of Damage Per hit, setting a blaze any entity the Plasma touches.

### Energy Blade
The Energy Blade Weapon is an item that deals 10 Hit Points, also granting the player speed 1 when they hold it in their main hand.

### M90 Shotgun
The M90 Shotgun is capable of holding 24 slugs, and has a fast reload time. When Fireing it shoots 4 shrapnel, shooting 2 slugs in the process.

### Battle Rifle
The Battle Rifle is an item holding 144 bullets. It has a fast fire rate, in a quick 3 round burst fire. Each Bullet Magazine holds 36 bullets.

### Minishark
Taken from another Minecraft Like Game, The Minishark Fires a Stream of Musketballs as long as you hold the fire button. You have Musketballs in you're inventory, or a "Bullet Bag" item. If you meet the Requirements, but the Gun still dosent fire. Check the in game controls.
